sections.subtitle: Recent Form Analysis
sections.text: Real Betis have shown decent form in their last 5 matches with 2 wins, 2 draws, and 1 loss, scoring 9 goals while conceding 8. Osasuna, on the other hand, have managed 2 wins, 1 draw, and 2 losses, scoring 5 goals and conceding 5, indicating a more balanced but less prolific attack.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last 2 head-to-head matches, Real Betis have a slight edge with a 2-1 win away and a 1-1 draw at home against Osasuna. Both teams have scored in each of these encounters, suggesting a competitive fixture.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics Overview
sections.text: Real Betis (9th, 9 points) have outperformed Osasuna (13th, 7 points) this season, with stronger attacking stats (9 goals vs 5) and defensive solidity (7 goals conceded vs 5). Betis also excel in creating big chances and winning duels, which could give them an edge.

sections.subtitle: Key Trends and Streaks
sections.text: Real Betis have a streak of no losses in their last 3 matches and both teams scoring in their last 5 games. Osasuna matches often see under 2.5 goals (6/7), which might indicate a low-scoring affair despite Betis’ attacking form.
